taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Infrastructure Engineer
core_skills: Cloud hosted web applications, AWS, Terraform, Developer tooling, Monitoring tools
skill_match_scores: Cloud hosted web applications:0.5, AWS:1.0, Terraform:0.0, Developer tooling:0.0, Monitoring tools:0.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of experience with cloud hosted web applications, preferably with some startup experience, You love digging into complex problems and determining both the root cause and the best solution to fix, You're happy spelunking logs and running diagnostic tools to make sure you understand the problem, You sail through ambiguity and enjoy jumping around the stack, touching everything from low level networking and file systems to database configuration and high level architecture, Iteration is part of the fun. You're not married to specific ideas or solutions, You want your impact to go beyond the lines of code you write, Safety first. You care about quality, testing, and security, You like digging deeply into new technologies, new domains, or new ideas, You want to build something exceptionally valuable and have a real impact on the world. You're excited to get your hands dirty in pursuit of that goal
preferred_quals: (Bonus) Experience in the financial sector, especially around compliance or fraud
core_responsibilities: Support the underlying infrastructure that enables our platform to help fight financial crime. You’ll build developer tooling, manage our AWS environment using Terraform, make cross-cutting code changes, analyze scaling issues, setup and configure monitoring tools, and identify performance bottlenecks, Work with a small, passionate, and experienced team: We're a small team of mostly senior engineers and we love to do great work together. We're fully remote, but we make a strong effort to prioritize, design, and code collaboratively, Grapple with the challenges of working in a high security, high stakes environment: We work with some of the most sensitive data you can imagine and provide a critical service to our customers. Security, reliability, and correctness must always come first, Influence the overall architecture and hosting strategy: Great ideas come from everywhere. Everyone on the team has a voice in technical discussions, and is trusted to make significant decisions, Have the opportunity to grow into leadership: Hummingbird is growing rapidly. As we do, there will be opportunities for engineers to take on new roles in product, technology, or people leadership positions
job_summary: Hummingbird is a remote-first, fully distributed team united by the shared mission of helping fight financial crime. The Senior Software Engineer, Infrastructure will be responsible for building a platform that can scale to meet customer needs, while working collaboratively with a passionate team to tackle complex challenges in a high-security environment.
